channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: California National Parks Reach Record Visitor Numbers Amid Operational Challenges
item.description: California’s nine national parks recorded a historic 12 million visits in 2025, surpassing previous records despite a series of challenges including staff layoffs, a 43-day federal shutdown, and contr...

item.title: 20-Year-Old Dies as Truck Hits Scooter on Delhi's ITO Flyover; Two Others Injured
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred on the ITO flyover in central Delhi during the intervening night of March 11 and 12, 2026. Three young men, all in their early twenties, were riding a scooter when a tr...

item.title: Casting directors recognised with new Oscar category for 2026
item.description: For decades, casting directors have been the unsung heroes of the film industry, shaping the very fabric of movies by choosing the right actors for each role. Despite Martin Scorsese’s assertion that ...

item.title: AmaZulu edge Richards Bay 2-1 with Ekstein's late winner in KwaZulu-Natal derby
item.description: AmaZulu ended a four-match winless streak in the Betway Premiership with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over Richards Bay at Moses Mabhida Stadium. The KwaZulu-Natal derby saw an exciting first half, with ...

item.title: China and the U.S. Prepare Rival Uncrewed Bases at the Moon’s South Pole
item.description: The article by Daniel Marín examines the accelerating competition between China and the United States to establish uncrewed lunar bases at the Moon’s south pole, a key step toward future human mission...

item.title: Lockeport Debates Mermaid Statue Proposal as Tourism Initiative
item.description: The small town of Lockeport, Nova Scotia, population 476, is considering a plan to install a mermaid statue to attract more tourists. The town's heritage and tourism committee sees the statue as a way...

item.title: Bangladeshi national arrested by West Bengal STF for aiding Osman Hadi murder suspects to enter India
item.description: The Special Task Force (STF) of West Bengal Police has apprehended a Bangladeshi national for assisting the alleged killers of Sharif Osman Hadi, a Bangladeshi youth leader, to illegally enter India. ...

item.title: Exploring Female Loneliness and Obsessive Friendships in Contemporary Tokyo
item.description: Following the success of her novel Butter, Asako Yuzuki returns with Hooked, translated by Polly Barton, which delves into the complex and often troubling dynamics of female relationships in contempor...

item.title: UAE’s Fujairah Port Faces Disruptions After Drone Attack, Impacting Oil Supply
item.description: Some oil loading operations at UAE’s Fujairah port have been temporarily suspended following a drone attack and fire on Saturday. Fujairah is a critical hub, exporting more than 1.7 million barrels pe...

item.title: Apple Updates MacBook Keycaps from Text to Glyphs on Several Keys
item.description: Apple has updated the keyboard design for its latest MacBook Air and MacBook Pro models, replacing text labels with glyphs on the Tab, Caps Lock, Shift, Return, and Delete keys for U.S. English layout...

item.title: Australia’s cautious stance amid US-Iran tensions discussed by Paul Daley
item.description: Guardian Australia columnist Paul Daley examines the risks Australia faces in the wake of escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, particularly under former President Donald Trump and i...

item.title: Chelsea Trail Newcastle 0-1 at Half-Time in Premier League Match at Stamford Bridge
item.description: This live blog from the Daily Mail covers the Premier League match between Chelsea and Newcastle United on 14 March 2026 at Stamford Bridge. Newcastle took the lead in the 17th minute through Anthony ...

item.title: IEBC Launches 30-Day Drive to Register 2.5 Million New Voters
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has kicked off a 30-day intensive voter registration drive targeting 2.5 million new voters ahead of the 2027 General Election. This marathon...

item.title: Congress releases additional 23 candidates for upcoming Assam assembly elections
item.description: The Congress party has announced its second batch of candidates for the forthcoming Assam assembly elections. This list includes 23 individuals, complementing the first list previously released. The m...

item.title: Most Nigerians support women leaders, but institutional barriers remain
item.description: According to the 2025/2026 Nigeria Leadership Readiness Brief from the Reykjavik Index for Leadership, almost nine in ten Nigerians dey comfortable with women leading big companies, and more than thre...

item.title: TMA cautions on heavy rains and flood risks in coastal regions
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) has issued a warning to communities in several coastal regions about the potential for heavy rainfall and flooding. According to TMA, areas including Lindi,...

item.title: Michaela Gosselin earns bronze in women's slalom, marking Canada's 200th Winter Paralympic medal
item.description: On Day 8 of the Milano-Cortina 2026 Paralympics, Michaela Gosselin of Collingwood, Ontario, earned bronze in the women's slalom standing event, marking her first Paralympic podium and the historic 200...

item.title: Indian Railways to Launch Faster and Modern Ticketing System
item.description: Indian Railways is all set to replace its four-decade-old ticketing software with a new, faster, and more scalable reservation system. For years, passengers have faced frustration with the existing e-...

item.title: Mosiuoa 'Terror' Lekota’s Role in Rebuilding the ANC During Natal’s Turbulent Times
item.description: Mosiuoa 'Terror' Lekota played a pivotal role in restoring the African National Congress (ANC) structures in South Africa’s Natal province during the volatile period following the unbanning of the ANC...

item.title: How Crude Oil is Refined into Everyday Fuels and Products
item.description: As tensions escalate between the US, Israel, and Iran, the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and attacks on Middle Eastern oil facilities have driven Brent crude prices above US$100 per barrel, impactin...
